query:
DELETE FROM properties WHERE id = 30001;

UPDATE properties SET plotSize = 1.43 WHERE id = 3;

INSERT INTO properties (id, title, description, price, priceEur, bedrooms, bathrooms, size, plotSize, listingType, features, images, videoUrl, fazwazUrl) VALUES (
  91001,
  'So close to the beach side Land Plot for Sale | Sam Roi Yot',
  'A rare opportunity to own a well-positioned land plot in Sam Roi Yot, one of Thailand''s most scenic and unspoiled coastal areas — just 400 meters from a peaceful beach. This 78 sqw (312 sqm) plot benefits from an exceptional dual road frontage, offering outstanding accessibility and flexibility for future development — whether residential, holiday rental, or long-term investment. Why this plot stands out: 🏖️ 400m walk to a quiet, unspoiled beach 🛣️ Roads on two sides — rare and highly practical 📋 Transfer fees paid entirely by the seller — zero hidden costs ✅ Ready for immediate transfer 💰 Priced at 2.99 mil THB (81.5k Euros). Sam Roi Yot offers a tranquil lifestyle within easy reach of Pranburi and Hua Hin, with the national park, caves, and coastal scenery on your doorstep. Land in this area remains competitively priced with strong long-term upside.',
  2990000,
  81500,
  0,
  0,
  312,
  0.195,
  'sale',
  JSON_ARRAY('seaView', 'beachfront'),
  JSON_ARRAY('/land_u6131064_main.webp'),
  NULL,
  'https://www.fazwaz.com/property-sales/land-for-sale-in-sam-roi-yot-hua-hin-u6131064'
)
